sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n72845" key="o)kta/troxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀκτά-τροχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n72845.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with eight wheels,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:18:16" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.16</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
